allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: MVP build — paste-to-rehearse with 3 voice-first modes

Steps 1-11 of CLAUDE.md spec complete:
- Next.js 14 with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind
- Design system with dark theme, 60px touch targets
- IndexedDB via idb for local storage
- Zustand stores for talks, settings, rehearsal state
- Import flow: paste text to create slides
- Home screen with talk list
- Talk detail with mode selection
- Speech synthesis with sentence chunking
- Three rehearsal modes:
  - Listen: TTS reads notes, auto-advance
  - Prompt: hear title, recite from memory, say "reveal"
  - Test: slide number only, say "help" if stuck
- Voice commands primary interaction \(next, back, repeat, reveal, help\)
- Settings: voice, rate, auto-advance, voice commands toggle
- Chime sounds for transitions and completion

Voice-first design: user can complete entire rehearsal hands-free.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
